title: Visible Enchantment Levels
description: Adds an overlay to enchantment books that shows you what level they are.
body:
This pack adds an overlay to the enchanted book texture that shows what level the books enchant is. The pack will only work properly for books with only a single enchant. 
It currently supports levels 1-5 but I might add supports for levels going up to 10, as that is what minecraft supports for it's enchantment formatting.

There are 2 versions of this pack, the Roman Numerals one and the Numbers one.

**DISCLAIMER: As far as I am aware, this pack is (sadly) not compatible with packs that change the design of the book based on enchants. This is due to the way that minecraft works and is not fixable.**

_If this becomes supported in the future or you know a method to make compatibility an option, message me on discord._ Username: wackyninja303
